title: Emergency Preparedness Checklist
summary: Get the essentials in place before a crisis, not during one.

tasks.title: Create an emergency contact sheet
tasks.explanation: Doctors, pharmacy, nearby family, and one out-of-town contact everyone can reach.

tasks.title: List current medications and dosages
tasks.explanation: Keep one copy at home and one in a bag ready to go with your loved one.

tasks.title: Locate power of attorney and health care proxy
tasks.explanation: Know where these are and who else has access to copies.
tasks.jurisdictionNote: Requirements vary by state — check with an elder law attorney if unsure.

tasks.title: Confirm insurance card locations and policy numbers
tasks.explanation: Medicare, supplemental, and any long-term care policies.

tasks.title: Share a spare key with someone nearby
tasks.explanation: A trusted neighbor or nearby family member, in case of a lockout during an emergency.

tasks.title: Post emergency instructions somewhere visible
tasks.explanation: On the fridge or by the phone — simple enough for a first responder to use.
